requirements.requirement: Conduct cloud-specific risk assessments for all proposed cloud adoptions covering shared responsibility and data sovereignty
requirements.rationale: Addresses unique risks of cloud environments for capital market data

requirements.requirement: Implement data governance controls for cloud-hosted market data and client information including encryption with customer-managed keys
requirements.rationale: Maintains data protection in multi-tenant cloud environments

requirements.requirement: Develop and maintain exit strategies for material cloud services with tested portability
requirements.rationale: Ensures continuity of market operations if cloud services must be transitioned
